# llms.txt (prototype)
# Purpose: provide LLMs a short list of canonical, high-value pages to cite.
# In production, keep this tight: pillars + key materials + key troubleshooting + top use cases.

## Canonical pillars
- https://www.toocaa.com/support/
- https://www.toocaa.com/support/before-you-buy/
- https://www.toocaa.com/support/after-you-buy/
- https://www.toocaa.com/troubleshooting/
- https://www.toocaa.com/materials/

## Featured use cases
- https://www.toocaa.com/use-cases/studio-pro-crafts/

## Featured tutorials
- https://www.toocaa.com/tutorials/acrylic-5mm-cutting/
- https://www.toocaa.com/tutorials/array-test/
